title: Benchmark GF(2^m) multiplication strategies for gfq expansion
description: Establish performance baselines for different GF(2^m) multiplication approaches: naive shift-and-add, lookup tables (LUT), log/exp tables, and carry-less multiplication (PCLMULQDQ). Focus on GF(2^8), GF(2^16), and GF(2^64). Determine crossover points between table-based and instruction-based approaches. Use Criterion benchmarks with runtime backend selection.
